category_sources: Official Siril homepage says Siril is an astronomical image processing tool.
source_facts.description says Astronomical image processing tool.
docs_sources: Official Siril site has a dedicated Docs page linking online documentation, PDF, commands, Python API, and man pages.
Official docs page links Read the Docs as the online documentation surface.
repo_sources: Official GitLab project describes the Siril image processing software for amateur astronomy.
Official Siril source installation documentation says to clone https://gitlab.com/free-astro/siril.git.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes preprocessing, stacking, enhancement, and scientific analysis workflows.
